message:
fix(fnx-python): add __hash__ to PyTieBreakPolicy for dict/set use

TieBreakPolicy had __eq__ but no __hash__, making it unhashable.
This prevented use as dict keys or in sets. Now policies can be
used in collections: {TieBreakPolicy.lex_min(): "lexmin"}

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
